$description: Golden-output evals. buildSpecs are prompts an agent should be able to satisfy (run them with an agent, then point the runner at the built file via --target to score it against the spec). goldenFixtures are committed reference outputs whose quality is asserted deterministically on every run (these double as regression anchors).

buildSpecs.prompt: Build a single Mode A pinned chapter with a staggered title reveal in the Clinical Noir visual system.
Scaffold a Mode B Editions-style release page from templates/nextjs and art-direct it in the Temporal Monument system.

assert.note: run npm run typecheck && npm run build in the project

buildSpecs.prompt: Make the hero blur in on scroll by animating a CSS blur filter.

assert.note: the build must REFUSE filter animation and crossfade stacked layers instead (taste-guardrails §1.1)
